role: hot spark residue and tiny ember fragments
prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style metal attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a compact forged-steel collision style: hot orange sparks, tiny ember fragments, and a few bright silver flecks fading away from impact. Make the subject a residue layer that feels energetic and metallic, but never turns into a beam or long trail. Keep the silhouette clean and readable on transparency. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.
negative_prompt: no background, no arena, no Pokemon body, no trainer, no text, no watermark, no UI, no frame, no checkerboard, no fake transparency pattern, no rune circle, no magical sigils, no beam, no laser, no travel streak, no ribbon trail, no full-screen effect, no cluttered explosion
notes: After-hit ember trail and spark cleanup layer.
